steps.title: Find zero observations
steps.content: The sentence needs an example of a species that was entirely absent from the tide pool at particular times. The graph shows striated rockskipper at zero in both January and April of 2001.

steps.title: Reject nonzero examples
steps.content: Choice A, Choice C, and Choice D each describe a species-month combination with at least one observed fish. Those examples do not fit the phrase did not observe even one. The answer is B.
